tasks.title: Design app architecture, folder structure, and data schema
tasks.description: Design the overall app architecture including folder structure, React component hierarchy, data flow, IndexedDB schema with versioning, TypeScript models for all entities (tasks, vocabulary, journals, settings, etc.), and PWA configuration. Document the design in docs/architecture.md and docs/schema.md. Include detailed schema for IndexedDB stores and relations, and define TypeScript interfaces for all data models.
acceptanceCriteria: Architecture document covers folder structure, component hierarchy, data flow
IndexedDB schema document defines all object stores and indexes
TypeScript models cover all core entities with proper typing
PWA configuration plan included
tasks.expectedResult: Comprehensive design documents and TypeScript model files defining app structure and data schema

outputPlan.description: App architecture and folder structure design document
IndexedDB schema and TypeScript data models design document
TypeScript interfaces and types for all app data entities
PWA configuration and service worker setup plan

metadata.inputContext: Initial project requirements and feature list
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational design and data schema for all subsequent implementation tasks

tasks.title: Initialize Vite React TypeScript project with Tailwind CSS and PWA support
tasks.description: Create a new Vite project configured for React and TypeScript. Integrate Tailwind CSS with proper configuration. Setup PWA support using Vite plugin or manual service worker registration to enable offline usage. Configure basic project structure with src/, public/, and assets folders. Add initial ESLint and Prettier configs for code quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Vite React TS project created and builds successfully
Tailwind CSS styles load correctly
PWA service worker registers and app works offline after first load
Linting and formatting configured

commands: npm run build && npm run lint

tasks.expectedResult: Fully initialized frontend project with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and PWA support ready for development

outputPlan.description: Vite config with React, TypeScript, and PWA plugin

metadata.inputContext: App architecture and design documents
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the base frontend project setup for all app development

tasks.title: Implement IndexedDB data layer with schema versioning and migration
tasks.description: Create a data access layer in src/db/index.ts that manages IndexedDB connections, schema versioning, and migrations. Define object stores for all main entities: daily tasks, vocabulary, journals, settings, mistakes, mock tests, grammar notes, etc. Implement helper functions for CRUD operations and queries. Include error handling and fallback mechanisms. Provide TypeScript types for all DB operations.
acceptanceCriteria: IndexedDB schema matches design document
Versioning and migration logic implemented
CRUD functions for all stores implemented and typed
Error handling and fallback implemented
tasks.expectedResult: Robust IndexedDB data layer with versioning and migration ready for app data storage

outputPlan.description: IndexedDB data access layer with schema and migration
TypeScript types for IndexedDB entities and operations

metadata.inputContext: App architecture, schema design, and project setup
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the core persistent data storage layer for the app

tasks.title: Create reusable UI components and layout system with Tailwind CSS
tasks.description: Develop a set of reusable React UI components in src/components/ui including Button, Card, Modal, Input, Select, Textarea, Tabs, Tooltip, and Chart wrappers. Implement a responsive layout system with header, sidebar navigation, and main content area supporting mobile and desktop views. Add dark mode toggle support. Use Tailwind CSS utility classes and ensure accessibility (ARIA roles, keyboard navigation).
acceptanceCriteria: UI components are reusable and documented
Layout supports responsive design and dark mode
Accessibility best practices followed
Components have TypeScript typings
tasks.expectedResult: A library of reusable UI components and responsive layout system ready for page development

outputPlan.description: Reusable Button component with variants and accessibility
Responsive app layout with header and sidebar

metadata.inputContext: Project setup with Tailwind CSS
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational UI components and layout for all pages

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard page with study summary cards and charts
tasks.description: Create src/pages/Dashboard.tsx implementing the Dashboard page. Display today's IELTS plan, study streak, weekly progress, total study hours, target band, current estimated level, weak skills, upcoming review tasks, today's recommended focus, and motivational progress summary. Use cards and charts components. Fetch data from IndexedDB via data layer. Support dark mode and responsive design.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows all required data points
Data is loaded from IndexedDB correctly
Charts render study progress and skill balance
Responsive and accessible UI
tasks.expectedResult: Fully functional Dashboard page showing personalized IELTS study summary and progress

outputPlan.description: Dashboard page component with summary cards and charts

metadata.inputContext: UI components, data layer, and app architecture
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the main user landing page with study overview and motivation

tasks.title: Implement Daily Study Planner page with task CRUD and recurring support
tasks.description: Create src/pages/DailyPlan.tsx implementing the Daily Study Planner page. Allow users to create, edit, delete daily study tasks with categories (Vocabulary, Reading, Listening, Writing Task 1/2, Speaking Parts, Grammar, Mock Test). Support marking tasks as done, adding notes, tracking completion history, recurring tasks, and weekly schedule. Use data layer for persistence. Provide filters and sorting. Responsive and accessible UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can CRUD daily tasks with all required fields
Recurring tasks and weekly schedule supported
Task completion and notes tracked and persisted
UI is responsive and accessible
tasks.expectedResult: Daily Study Planner page fully functional with task management and recurring scheduling

metadata.inputContext: Dashboard page, data layer, UI components
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables users to plan and track daily IELTS study tasks effectively

tasks.title: Implement IELTS Goal Settings page with localStorage persistence
tasks.description: Create src/pages/Settings.tsx implementing the IELTS Goal Settings page. Allow users to set target band, current estimated band, exam date, daily study time, weak skills, preferred topics, and study reminder text. Store all settings in localStorage with proper TypeScript types. Provide form validation and user feedback. Support dark mode and responsive design.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings form allows editing all required fields
Settings persist in localStorage and load on app start
Form validation prevents invalid input
UI is responsive and accessible
tasks.expectedResult: Settings page fully functional with persistent user IELTS goal settings

metadata.inputContext: Data layer, UI components, app architecture
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Allows users to configure personal IELTS goals and preferences

tasks.title: Implement Vocabulary Notebook page with full CRUD and filtering
tasks.description: Create src/pages/Vocabulary.tsx implementing the Vocabulary Notebook page. Support adding vocabulary entries with all specified fields (word, meaning, Vietnamese meaning, pronunciation, part of speech, IELTS topic, example sentence, collocations, synonyms, antonyms, word family, personal note, difficulty level, status). Implement search, filtering by topic, status, difficulty, and tags. Support marking words as difficult or mastered. Show vocabulary statistics. Persist data in IndexedDB.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add, edit, delete vocabulary entries with all fields
Search and filters work correctly
Marking difficult/mastered updates status
Vocabulary statistics display accurate counts
Data persists in IndexedDB
tasks.expectedResult: Fully functional Vocabulary Notebook page with advanced management and filtering

metadata.inputContext: Data layer, UI components, app architecture
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides core vocabulary management functionality essential for IELTS learning

tasks.title: Implement Vocabulary Review System with spaced repetition
tasks.description: Create src/pages/VocabularyReview.tsx implementing the vocabulary review system using spaced repetition. Load daily review queue from IndexedDB. Support review modes: word to meaning, meaning to word, example sentence gap-fill, collocation recall. Provide buttons for Again, Hard, Good, Easy to update next review date automatically. Track review history and update vocabulary status accordingly. Responsive and accessible UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Daily review queue loads correctly
All review modes function as specified
Review buttons update next review date and status
Review history is tracked and persisted
UI is responsive and accessible
tasks.expectedResult: Functional vocabulary review page implementing spaced repetition system

outputPlan.description: Vocabulary Review page component with spaced repetition

metadata.inputContext: Vocabulary Notebook, data layer, UI components
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables effective vocabulary retention through spaced repetition review

tasks.title: Implement Reading Practice Journal page with session tracking
tasks.description: Create src/pages/ReadingJournal.tsx implementing the Reading Practice Journal page. Allow users to save reading sessions with all specified fields (title, IELTS topic, source URL, passage text, question type, total questions, correct answers, accuracy, time spent, new vocabulary, summary, mistakes, notes). Support question types as listed. Track reading speed and accuracy over time. Display reading progress charts. Persist data in IndexedDB.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add and edit reading sessions with all fields
Question types supported correctly
Reading speed and accuracy tracked and displayed
Data persists in IndexedDB
UI is responsive and accessible
tasks.expectedResult: Reading Practice Journal page fully functional with session tracking and progress visualization

tasks.description: Create src/pages/WritingPractice.tsx implementing the Writing Practice Log page. Allow comparing old and improved versions side-by-side. Track common mistakes and band trends. Persist data in IndexedDB.

tasks.title: Implement Import/Export Backup page with JSON data handling
tasks.description: Create src/pages/ImportExport.tsx implementing the Import/Export Backup page. Allow users to export all app data to JSON file and import data from JSON file with overwrite warning. Support automatic local backup download if possible. Validate imported data schema before applying. Provide user feedback on success or errors. Responsive and accessible UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Export generates complete JSON backup of all data
Import validates and loads JSON data correctly
Overwrite warning shown before import
UI is responsive and accessible
tasks.expectedResult: Import/Export Backup page fully functional for data backup and restore

metadata.inputContext: Data layer, UI components, app architecture
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures user data safety with backup and restore functionality

tasks.title: Add seed data for IELTS topics, sample tasks, vocabulary, grammar, writing, speaking, and mock tests
tasks.description: Create a seed data module in src/data/seed.ts exporting sample data for IELTS topics, daily tasks, vocabulary words, grammar topics, writing prompts, speaking questions, and mock test entries. Integrate seed data loading into IndexedDB on first app launch or reset. Provide scripts or UI option to reset sample data. Ensure seed data covers all core app features for initial user experience.
acceptanceCriteria: Seed data covers all specified entities
Seed data loads correctly into IndexedDB on first launch
Reset sample data option works
Seed data enables meaningful initial app usage
tasks.expectedResult: Seed data module created and integrated for initial app data population
